name: Create Hamburger Writing Template
description: An elementary school teacher needs a 'Hamburger Paragraph' visual aid to teach structured writing. Create a 3-page ActivInspire flipchart saved as '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/hamburger_paragraph.flipchart'. The flipchart must include a title page with the text 'Hamburger Paragraph', a model page featuring a vertically stacked burger diagram made of shapes labeled 'Topic Sentence' (top bun), 'Detail 1', 'Detail 2', 'Detail 3' (fillings), and 'Conclusion' (bottom bun), and a practice page titled 'My Paragraph' containing at least three horizontal lines for writing.
